_meta.title: Snapmaker U1 — native print state → normalized lifecycle (inherited Moonraker)
_meta.family: Snapmaker U1 (Klipper + Moonraker behind a Snapmaker auth/pairing wrapper)

derived_from.source_note: Clean-room from the vendor's own Flutter control-app string constants. No code copied; no secrets. No field confirmed against a real U1. Base object shapes: see ../klipper/state-enum.json.

notes: Snapmaker did NOT fork the protocol — `print_stats.state` is stock Moonraker (identical to ../klipper/state-enum.json). The U1 adds material/tool state under `custom.*`, but lifecycle state is unchanged.
Progress is file-byte (`virtual_sdcard.progress`), not time; times are in seconds (no ×60).
Auth boundary unconfirmed — whether Moonraker answers directly on LAN or only behind the `:8100` auth gate (which may require injecting the session token into every call).
It is a true toolchanger, not a feeder — orthogonal to the state enum.
